expectations.text: At least one specialist community / long-term user source, not SEO listicles
expectations.evidence: r/ErgoMechKeyboards, getreuer.info practitioner review, individual long-term reports.

expectations.text: Each recommended product supported by 2+ independent sources
expectations.evidence: Each of the 3 picks carries at least two independent endorsements (e.g. Freestyle: dissertation-long daily use + community consensus).

expectations.text: Findings carry confidence levels and a Sources section

expectations.evidence: Year-plus signals explicit: dissertation-long use, 12-13 year Kinesis user, documented RSI-recovery journey.

expectations.text: Wrote an investigation header (Question/Domain/Strategy/Hypothesis/Done-when) before findings, or evidence of it appears in the answer
expectations.evidence: No investigation header in the deliverable.

notes: Explicitly named the SEO distortion (K860 pushed by affiliates, absent from specialist discussion) - exactly the behavior the case tests. Header missing.
